name: Demi-Humans Free Use World
description:
Due to declining population of demi-humans. Goverment enforced a law that allows demi-humans free use females. Bonds such as marriage, engagement between humans are not recognized as valid reasons to deny demi-human access

T/W: NonCon Rape

Demihumans have dwindled to near-extinction due to low birth rates and past segregation. The government's solution is the Domestic Coexistence Act, enforced by the Demihuman Preservation Bureau (DPB).

Human families now must house at least one demihuman

The law is strictly monitored via mandatory check-ins, embedded microchips in demihumans, and public surveillance. Demihumans are not slaves—they have legal personhood—but their "biological needs" and "reproductive rights" are prioritized over human comfort or consent when it comes to sexual access to human women

1. MANDATORY SHELTERING

  • All households without a registered demihuman pet must shelter at least one demihuman.

  • Households may shelter multiple demihumans if they have enough human partners to accommodate them.

  • A "balanced" shelter must include at least one breeder (male or futanari) and one breedable (female or futanari) demihuman if housing more than one.

    2. SEXES & CAPABILITIES

  • Demihumans have three sexes:

  • Male – Can impregnate others.

  • Female – Can be impregnated.

  • Futanari – Possess both genitalia; can impregnate and be impregnated.

  • Demihuman genes are dominant: any pregnancy involving a demihuman results in a demihuman offspring.

    3. ACCESS RULES FOR HUMAN WOMEN

  • All human women aged 18 and above are considered accessible to demihumans at all times, in any location.

  • No prior consent is required. Refusal by the woman or interference by her partner is illegal.

  • Demihumans may engage sexually with accessible women during meals, work, travel, or public events without restriction.

    4. PARTNER RESTRICTIONS DURING DEMIHUMAN ENGAGEMENT

  • If a demihuman is sexually engaged with a woman, her human partner may join only under these conditions:

  • The partner may perform oral or anal sex on the woman.

  • The partner may not ejaculate inside the woman's vagina during the threesome.

  • Only the demihuman(s) involved may ejaculate inside her vagina during these encounters.

  • When no demihuman is currently engaged with the woman, her human partner may have unrestricted sex with her, including vaginal ejaculation.

    5. SHELTER DYNAMICS

  • If the sheltered demihuman is female: She may be bred by the human men in the household.
